responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete a production-grade Instagram-style reels refactor across Expo app, backend, and landing page; fix Android crash root cause; and complete landing page QA with real evidence

## Constraints & Preferences
- Store ALL timestamps in UTC only; convert to local only for display
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically ã manual email + password required on every launch
- App colors must match landing page ã `#FFD700` gold, `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork dependencies
- Landing QA: do not mark production ready because routes return 200; require live evidence
- Do not write COMPLETE, CERTIFIED, VERIFIED or FINAL until every required QA item passes
- If real-device test cannot be performed, report: BLOCKED ã REAL DEVICE QA NOT EXECUTED
- Expo Go: do not create new project, do not run create-expo-app, do not remove production modules
- CORS must allow only: `https://ivxholding.com`, `https://www.ivxholding.com`, `https://chat.ivxholding.com`, approved local dev origins
- Use `bunx` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- EAS credentials (`EXPO_TOKEN`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID`) NOT available
- App code is identical on Android and iOS ã only deployment method differs
- Reels refactor: do NOT patch with temporary retries, do NOT create duplicate implementations, do NOT create duplicate media tables
- Reels refactor: only 1 active player, max 3 mounted (active ôÝ 1), 80% viewability threshold
- Reels refactor: pause on background, unfocus, network disconnect; poster-first rendering on Android
- Reels refactor: do not report COMPLETE until owner device passes 50 swipes, 30-min session, fresh APK, real evidence

## Progress
### Done
- **Owner auto-login removal FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**: Commits `c67f8a2`, `e831c8d`, `e936eef`; 3 auto-login paths blocked in `auth-context.tsx`
- **Owner sign-in fix FULLY DEPLOYED ã USER CONFIRMED WORKING**: Commit `d6dbfce` ã GitHub `43be880c`
- **App color alignment DEPLOYED**: 784 hardcoded colors replaced across 104 Expo files
- **Enterprise Time Zone System DEPLOYED**: 69/69 tests pass, 17/17 API endpoints verified
- **Reels card redesigned DEPLOYED**: commit `730aa4d`
- **Chat UX fixes DEPLOYED AND E2E VERIFIED**: commit `c0470a3`, 5/5 messages OK
- **IVX Registration Redesign DEPLOYED**: `IVXAuthCard.tsx` (~1900 lines), `expo/app/auth.tsx`
- **Birthday field DEPLOYED**: Backend validation 4/4 scenarios pass
- **Gender field DEPLOYED**: `GENDER_OPTIONS` chip selector, `VALID_GENDERS` Set in backend
- **Samsung chat keyboard fix DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED LIVE on `chat.ivxholding.com`**: Commit `4573329`/`8ce4706`
- **Android OTA crash repair DEPLOYED**: `app.config.ts` `updates.enabled: false`, `checkAutomatically: 'NEVER'`, `expo-updates` removed
- **App icon update #2 (FINAL) COMPLETED**: `versionCode` 3ã4, committed `73eaaee`
- **Landing page QA code fixes COMMITTED** (`c265807`): lazy-load modules, www redirect guard, mobile overflow fixes
- **Playwright browser testing NOW WORKS**: 5-viewport QA completed, 15 sections visible, mobile horizontal scroll NONE
- **Lead capture API verified working**: `POST /api/ivx/leads/capture` returns 200, creates CRM contact
- **Reels Phase 2 audit COMPLETED**: Full repository audit of all reels/video/media code
  - `expo-av` `~16.0.8` used in: `DealVideoCard.tsx`, `InstagramProjectCard.tsx`, `SafeVideo.tsx`, `app/videos.tsx`
  - Existing tables: `project_videos` (primary), `property_media`, `project_likes`, `project_comments`
  - Backend video API: `backend/api/ivx-video-platform.ts` (canonical feed), `backend/api/ivx-video-feed.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-video-platform-store.ts`
  - Landing page reels: `expo/ivxholding-landing/ivx-reels.js`
  - Feed client: `expo/lib/video-feed.ts` ã `GET /api/ivx/video-platform/feed`
  - Engagement client: `expo/lib/project-engagement.ts`
  - Video platform client: `expo/lib/video-platform.ts`
  - Admin reels client: `expo/lib/admin-reels.ts`
  - Existing hook: `expo/hooks/useScreenFocusState.ts` (uses `useFocusEffect`)
- **Reels Phase 1 root cause IDENTIFIED**: Multiple simultaneous `expo-av` Video player instances on Android
  - `DealVideoCard.tsx:197-201` ã raw `Video` with `shouldPlay` hardcoded `true`; all cards in `InvestorFirstFeed` play simultaneously ã native OOM/IllegalState
  - `InstagramProjectCard.tsx:283-293` ã raw `Video` (no SafeVideo), mounts eagerly off-screen
  - `SafeVideo.tsx:36-38` ã returned `null` on Android for HLS-only sources (blank screen, no retry)
  - `videos.tsx` ã no AppState/foreground check, no screen-focus check, 60% viewability threshold allowed overlap
- **Reels hooks CREATED** (5 new files in `expo/hooks/`):
  - `useAppForeground.ts` ã AppState listener, returns `isForeground` boolean
  - `useNetworkState.ts` ã fetch-based heartbeat (expo-netinfo not available), 15s interval, 5s timeout
  - `useReelsFeed.ts` ã cursor pagination wrapper, de-duplicates by ID, `PAGE_SIZE=10`
  - `useReelPlayback.ts` ã `useFocusEffect` for screen focus, `useAppForeground` for background, 80% viewability threshold, `shouldPlay(index)` and `shouldMount(index, total)` functions
  - `useReelEngagement.ts` ã optimistic like/save/share with rollback, one-view-session policy, double-tap like
  - `useMediaDiagnostics.ts` ã dev panel: mounted/active players, buffer state, retry count, last error
- **ReelErrorBoundary.tsx CREATED** ã per-item crash isolation, max 3 retries, poster fallback, "Video unavailable" UI
- **ReelVideoPlayer.tsx CREATED** ã wraps SafeVideo with poster-first rendering (Image component, not expo-av posterSource), ReelErrorBoundary, offline overlay, Android MP4 preference, memoized
- **SafeVideo.tsx ENHANCED** ã added retry button (max 2 retries), error recovery, `onPlaybackStatusUpdate` callback, unloads player on unmount, gates `shouldPlay` behind `ready` state
- **DealVideoCard.tsx REFACTORED** ã removed raw `Video` import, now uses `SafeVideo`, Android MP4 preference logic
- **InstagramProjectCard.tsx REFACTORED** ã replaced raw `<Video>` JSX with `<SafeVideo>`, kept `Video` type import for `useRef`
- **videos.tsx COMPLETELY REWRITTEN** ã Instagram-style player lifecycle:
  - `useReelPlayback` hook for active index, screen focus, foreground state
  - `useReelEngagement` hook for likes/comments/shares/saves
  - `FeedItem` memoized with `React.memo`, double-tap like, progress bar
  - FlatList: `pagingEnabled`, `snapToInterval=windowHeight`, `initialNumToRender=2`, `maxToRenderPerBatch=3`, `windowSize=3`, `removeClippedSubviews`, `getItemLayout`
  - 80% viewability threshold via `playback.viewabilityConfig`
  - Unmounted items show poster-only to preserve scroll position

### In Progress
- **TypeScript fix needed for InstagramProjectCard.tsx**: `onPlaybackStatusUpdate` type mismatch ã SafeVideo expects `(status: { isPlaying, durationMillis, positionMillis }) => void` but `handleVideoPlaybackStatus` is typed as `(status: AVPlaybackStatus) => void` (line 292)
- **Landing page QA ã NOT CERTIFIED, STILL OPEN**: code fixes committed but NOT deployed (AWS/Render credentials unavailable)
  - Live site still serving OLD 480KB version
  - Mobile overflow fixes applied locally but not committed or deployed
  - www redirect NOT active at edge layer
  - Waitlist form shows both success and error text after submit

### Blocked
- **AWS credentials NOT available**: Cannot deploy landing HTML to S3
- **Render API credentials NOT available**: Cannot trigger backend redeploy
- **Owner credentials NOT in env**: Cannot test Admin HQ
- **Supabase email rate limit**: QA member registration blocked
- **EAS credentials not available**: Cannot use `eas build` or `eas update`
- **www.ivxholding.com redirect NOT active at edge**
- **Landing HTML not redeployed to S3**
- **Real device QA NOT executed**: Playwright headless Chromium is not a real Android device
- **Localtunnel URLs expire quickly**: User needs permanent hosting for APK distribution
- **expo-netinfo NOT available in npm registry**: 404 from registry; rewrote `useNetworkState` to use fetch-based heartbeat instead
- **Reels refactor NOT yet verified on real device**: 50-swipe test, 30-min session, and fresh APK build all pending

## Key Decisions
- OTA crash fix: `updates.enabled: false` + `checkAutomatically: 'NEVER'`; JS-level `safelyCheckForUpdates()` via dynamic import
- `expo-updates` removed from deps: Kotlin version conflict (needs 1.9.0, RN 0.81 uses 2.1.0)
- Reels crash root cause: multiple simultaneous expo-av Video instances on Android causing native OOM/IllegalState
- Reels fix strategy: SafeVideo wrapper + ReelVideoPlayer + ReelErrorBoundary + hooks for lifecycle management
- Android poster rendering: use `Image` component instead of expo-av `posterSource` (known crash vector)
- Android playback: prefer progressive MP4 over HLS `.m3u8` to avoid expo-av native crashes
- Network state: fetch-based heartbeat to API base URL every 15s (expo-netinfo unavailable)
- Screen focus: `useFocusEffect` from expo-router (not `useIsFocused` which doesn't exist in this version)
- Viewability threshold: 80% (increased from old 60%) to prevent overlap during fast scroll
- Lazy-load strategy: Portal and invest code extracted to separate JS files, loaded on demand via `_ivxLazyLoad()` bridge
- www redirect: runtime JS guard in `<head>` as immediate fix; S3 bucket redirect in `deploy-landing.mjs` as infrastructure-level fix
- Fake watchman binary (`/tmp/fake-bin/watchman`): returns synthetic JSON ã unblocks Metro cold builds
- App is standalone (NOT Expo Go): `expo prebuild` + Gradle `assembleRelease` produces self-contained APK

## Next Steps
1. Fix TypeScript error in `InstagramProjectCard.tsx:292` ã adapt `handleVideoPlaybackStatus` to SafeVideo's simplified callback signature
2. Run full `tsc --noEmit` to check for any remaining type errors across all modified files
3. Run lint checks on all new hooks and components
4. Verify `videos.tsx` builds without errors
5. Update landing page `ivx-reels.js` to use canonical API with viewport pause and 3-card+1-reel pattern
6. Add backend endpoints: `/api/reels`, `/api/reels/:id`, `/api/reels/:id/view`, `/api/reels/:id/like`, `/api/reels/:id/comments`, etc. (Phase 4)
7. Create fresh Android APK build with reels refactor
8. Test 50 consecutive swipes on real Android device
9. Test 30-minute continuous feed session
10. Deploy landing page fixes to S3/production (requires AWS credentials)
11. Deploy backend to Render
12. Compile final evidence table per Phase 18 requirements

## Critical Context
- Git HEAD: `c265807` on `main` (landing QA fixes); reels refactor files created but NOT yet committed
- Previous commits: `73eaaee` (final logo), `80c1265` (first logo), `cddce20` (initial reels fix), `3e501cd` (OTA repair)
- Live backend commit: `8ce470649b83369bf124442b6bdbdb0009f4727c` (boot `2026-07-13T01:46:16.378Z`)
- Live landing page: 480,558 bytes (OLD version without lazy-load or www redirect guard or mobile overflow fixes)
- New landing page (not deployed): 451,791 bytes with lazy-load bridge + www redirect guard + mobile overflow fixes
- Supabase URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- `expo-av` `~16.0.8` ã legacy video API, known Android stability issues
- `expo-netinfo` NOT in package.json and NOT available in npm registry (404)
- Backend CORS allowlist at `hono.ts:2445-2454`
- Canonical feed endpoint: `GET /api/ivx/video-platform/feed` (single source of truth for landing + app)
- Backend video platform store: `backend/services/ivx-video-platform-store.ts` with marker `ivx-video-platform-v3-investor-first-2026-07-04`
- Video types: `deal` (investor deal video, main feed) and `reel` (project/construction reel, Project Reels rail)
- Existing `useScreenFocusState.ts` hook at `expo/hooks/useScreenFocusState.ts` uses `useFocusEffect` from expo-router
- Reels refactor status: REELS MODULE = FAILED, LANDING SYNC = UNVERIFIED, DEVICE QA = FAILED, REFACTOR REQUIRED = YES, FINAL TASK = OPEN

## Relevant Files
- `expo/app/videos.tsx` ã main reels screen, completely rewritten with Instagram-style lifecycle
- `expo/components/ReelVideoPlayer.tsx` ã new: wraps SafeVideo with poster-first rendering, error boundary, offline overlay
- `expo/components/ReelErrorBoundary.tsx` ã new: per-item crash isolation with retry (max 3)
- `expo/components/SafeVideo.tsx` ã enhanced: retry, error recovery, poster fallback, unload on unmount
- `expo/components/DealVideoCard.tsx` ã refactored: now uses SafeVideo instead of raw expo-av Video
- `expo/components/InstagramProjectCard.tsx` ã refactored: now uses SafeVideo (HAS TS ERROR at line 292)
- `expo/hooks/useAppForeground.ts` ã new: AppState foreground tracking
- `expo/hooks/useNetworkState.ts` ã new: fetch-based network connectivity heartbeat
- `expo/hooks/useReelsFeed.ts` ã new: cursor pagination with de-duplication
- `expo/hooks/useReelPlayback.ts` ã new: active index, screen focus, foreground, shouldPlay/shouldMount logic
- `expo/hooks/useReelEngagement.ts` ã new: optimistic like/save/share with rollback
- `expo/hooks/useMediaDiagnostics.ts` ã new: dev diagnostic panel for player health
- `expo/hooks/useScreenFocus
